stance_taxonomy.recognition: treats alienação parental / alienación parental as a real, assessable phenomenon; operates or endorses PA-specific assessment, expert-witness or reunification work; typically PASG / CEAP / GARI-PA-aligned
stance_taxonomy.critique: argues the PA construct (especially Gardner's SAP) is operationalised against DV / coercive-control survivors; advocates DV/trauma-informed alternatives and tighter regulation of expert witnesses; supports repeal or jurisprudential proscription
stance_taxonomy.middle: engages both alienating-behaviour and family-violence frames; differential-diagnosis or systemic / multi-family approach; not aligned with PASG and not in the abolitionist critique camp

latam_context_notes.BR: CFP (https://site.cfp.org.br/) federally regulates 24 CRPs. CFP Nota Técnica 4/2022/GTEC/CG instructs psicólogos not to ground analyses on Lei 12.318/2010 and recognises gender bias in PA allegations. IBDFAM + Calçada/Brazil/Perissini push back. PL 1.372/2023 (full revocation) passed CCJ 37-28 on 3 Dec 2025.
latam_context_notes.MX: Cédula profesional via SEP; no single binding national colegio of psychologists. SCJN Acción de Inconstitucionalidad 11/2016 (Oaxaca) struck criminal/loss-of-custody automaticity. SCJN Protocolo para Juzgar con Perspectiva de Infancia y Adolescencia (Nov 2021) is doctrinal anchor.
latam_context_notes.AR: Provincial colegios (Colpsiba, CPCBA, etc.). Ley 24.270 criminalises contact obstruction but does not codify SAP. ASAPMI (https://asapmi.org.ar/) institutional critique pole; CEAP Argentina (https://alienacionparental.com.ar/) institutional recognition pole.
latam_context_notes.CO: COLPSIC (https://www.colpsic.org.co/) federal regulator. COLPSIC Posición Gremial sobre Alienación Parental (16 Nov 2023) + Corte Constitucional Sentencia T-526/23 (30 Nov 2023) institutionally proscribed SAP as judicial criterion. ICBF (https://www.icbf.gov.co/) institutional family-court psychology body.
latam_context_notes.CL: Colegio de Psicólogos de Chile voluntary post-1981. SENAME / mejor niñez (https://www.mejorninez.cl/) does not address PA. No institutional doctrine. Individual academics (UTA, UCN) + IChTF are principal clinical voices.

latam_lawyers: Mauricio Luis Mizrahi (AR) — CEAP chair, jurist, in /practitioners-latam-lawyers.md
eu_therapists: Sonia Vaccaro (AR-born / Madrid-based) — primary entry under Spain in /practitioners-eu-therapists.md; cross-referenced under AR here
us_therapists: William Bernet — CEAP / GARI-PA member; primary entry in /practitioners-us-therapists.md
evidence: COLPSIC Posición Gremial 2023 + Corte Constitucional T-526/23 — cross-listed in /case-studies/ and /evidence-international-institutional-positions.md

practitioners.stance_source: Co-autor (con Mizrahi y Herscovici) Alienación Parental: Niños huérfanos de padres vivos; CEAP presentation Alienación Parental como Abuso Parento-Filial por Violencia y Maltrato Infantil (1er Congreso CEAP CABA Nov 2024); presentation Terminología y Denominación de los Fenómenos de Alienación Parental (seminario preparatorio CEAP) https://alienacionparental.com.ar/en/seminario-preparatorio-del-1er-congreso-internacional-interdisciplinario-sobre-alienacion-parental-y-violencia-familiar/ ; La Nación https://www.lanacion.com.ar/sociedad/previene-hechos-de-violencia-al-tratar-a-la-familia-en-disolucion-nid452785/

Co-autor Alienación Parental: Niños huérfanos de padres vivos

practitioners.primary_contact: infamilia@outlook.com ; Instituto de la Familia, Acassuso 907, San Isidro, Buenos Aires

practitioners.name: INSTITUTIONAL — ASAPMI (Asociación Argentina de Prevención del Maltrato Infanto-Juvenil)
practitioners.practice: Leading Argentine professional society on prevention of child maltreatment; integra psicólogos, psiquiatras, asistentes sociales y juristas
practitioners.specialty: Prevention of maltrato infanto-juvenil; abuso sexual infantil; crítica institucional al SAP/AP como construcción acientífica utilizada para invalidar testimonios infantiles
practitioners.stance_source: ASAPMI Pronunciamiento sobre el supuesto Síndrome de Alienación Parental http://www.asapmi.org.ar/publicaciones/notas/?id=507 — el supuesto SAP no constituye una enfermedad por cuanto carece de validez científica; ASAPMI Comentarios sobre el Pretendido SAP http://www.asapmi.org.ar/publicaciones/notas/?id=968 ; ASAPMI Glosario http://asapmi.org.ar/glosario/?id=358 ; ASAPMI Análisis sobre las bases científicas del SAP http://www.asapmi.org.ar/publicaciones/articulos/articulo.asp?id=755 ; joint statement 2020 cited Página/12 https://www.pagina12.com.ar/273858
programs_or_publications: Pronunciamiento sobre el supuesto SAP — canonical Argentine institutional critique statement
Análisis sobre las bases científicas del SAP de Gardner
Glosario online (entry on AP)
2020 joint media-repudiation statement (Fantino a la tarde)
Sección Abuso Sexual Infantil https://asapmi.org.ar/abuso-sexual-infantil/
practitioners.hook: Single most authoritative Argentine professional-society voice on critique side; cited by Defensoría del Pueblo CABA (2020) and routinely in Página/12 and academic critique literature.

practitioners.name: INSTITUTIONAL — Colegio Colombiano de Psicólogos (COLPSIC)
practitioners.practice: Federal regulator of Colombian psychologists (administra tarjeta profesional); 7 capítulos regionales
practitioners.specialty: Federal regulation of psychological practice in Colombia; PA-specific institutional doctrine for psicólogos peritos
practitioners.stance_source: COLPSIC Posición Gremial sobre Alienación Parental (16 Nov 2023) https://www.colpsic.org.co/comunicados/posicion-del-colegio-colombiano-de-psicologos-colpsic-frente-al-concepto-de-alienacion-parental/ and PDF https://www.colpsic.org.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/2023-11-16-Posicion-Gremial-sobre-Alienacion-Parental-Colpsic-2023.pdf — formally updates COLPSIC's prior 2017 forensic-psychology unit report; rejects SAP/AP as diagnostic category; cited and partially adopted by Corte Constitucional Sentencia T-526/23 (30 Nov 2023) https://www.corteconstitucional.gov.co/relatoria/2023/t-526-23.htm ; commentary eticapsicologica.org https://eticapsicologica.org/index.php/documentos/noticias-y-eventos/item/92-com-sept-24 ; lpderecho.pe https://lpderecho.pe/uso-sindrome-alienacion-parental-proscribirse-criterio-procesos-judiciales-sustento-cientifico-colombia-sentencia-t-526-2023/
programs_or_publications: Posición Gremial sobre Alienación Parental (16 Nov 2023) — institutional doctrinal anchor
Listado oficial de peritos psicólogos COLPSIC https://www.colpsic.org.co/servicios/listado-de-peritos/
Etiqueta T-526 archive https://www.colpsic.org.co/etiqueta/t-526/
practitioners.primary_contact: COLPSIC, Av. Cra 50 No 26-20, Bogotá D.C. — institutional channel https://www.colpsic.org.co/
practitioners.hook: Single most authoritative Colombian institutional voice on critique pole; 16 Nov 2023 position operationalised 14 days later by Corte Constitucional in T-526/23 — Colombia is the LATAM jurisdiction with the cleanest institutional-clinical-judicial alignment on critique side.

practitioners.name: INSTITUTIONAL — Instituto Colombiano de Bienestar Familiar (ICBF)

practitioners.stance_source: ICBF's institutional intervention cited in Corte Constitucional Sentencia T-526/23 as channel through which the Court learned of COLPSIC's non-support of SAP — desclab https://www.desclab.com/post/alienacion ; ICBF Lineamientos Técnicos para Atención Integral a NNA operate as doctrinal anchor for defensorías de familia psychology

Lineamientos Técnicos para Atención Integral NNA

practitioners.stance_source: Cáceres in El síndrome de alienación parental: una realidad latente (Emol, 11 Mar 2011) — es un concepto antiguo que en su idea original tenía una lógica que es bastante dañina en cuanto pone a un progenitor como víctima y al otro como perpetrador; es una situación extrema que ocurre con poca frecuencia https://www.emol.com/noticias/Tendencias/2011/03/11/734921/El-sindrome-de-alienacion-parental-una-realidad-latente.html ; IChTF blog discussion of abuso sexual intrafamiliar / AP dilemma http://ichtf.blogspot.com/2016/ ; IChTF Modelo Sistémico-Contextual-Relacional positioning https://www.linkedin.com/company/instituto-chileno-de-terapia-familiar

IChTF curriculum on abuso intrafamiliar / AP differential
IChTF YouTube content https://www.youtube.com/@ICTerapiaFamiliar
practitioners.primary_contact: IChTF Santiago de Chile — via LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/instituto-chileno-de-terapia-familiar institutional channel

honest_gaps: Mexico critique-camp clinician individual entry: None publicly confirmable. CONAVIM, INMUJERES and CEAV have not issued sourced PA-specific clinical positions; the critique side is represented institutionally only via the SCJN Protocolo (middle/procedural). Mexico has a vigorous feminist legal critique but a thin individual clinician-author footprint.

Colombia individual recognition-camp clinician: Institutionally orphaned post-T-526/23. Pre-2023 pro-recognition position of COLPSIC's Unidad de Psicología Jurídica y Forense (2017) was institutionally retracted Nov 2023; no individual Colombian psicólogo with current public-facing PA-recognition practice site + sourced stance is retrievable.

Chile institutional doctrine on PA: Does not exist. SENAME / mejor niñez does not address PA; Colegio de Psicólogos has issued no equivalent of COLPSIC's Posición Gremial. Chile is the LATAM jurisdiction with the least institutional clinical engagement on PA in either direction.

CRP / colegio numbers: Only Calçada (CRP 05/18785) and her collaborating team have publicly displayed Brazilian CRP numbers. Argentine psiquiatra colegio numbers and Mexican cédulas profesionales are generally not publicly displayed on practitioner sites; verification requires direct lookup via the relevant national register before formal outreach.

Specific PA-publication confirmation for senior names: Eva Giberti's PA-specific publications are dispersed across Página/12 columns and book chapters rather than peer-reviewed clinical literature; her stance is sourced via institutional role (Programa Las Víctimas) and named-press alignment, not a single peer-reviewed PA paper.
